description: This Java class `LoanApplicationDraftService` provides business logic for managing loan application drafts in a Spring Boot application. It includes operations such as creating, reading, updating, patching sections, running risk decisioning, evaluating readiness, submitting, and deleting drafts. The class integrates with various repositories, external services, and handles JSON data structures related to loan application drafts.

classes.name: LoanApplicationDraftService
classes.description: Service class implementing business logic for loan draft management in a Spring Boot environment.

methods.name: create
methods.description: Creates a new loan application draft for the specified user.

methods.name: get
methods.description: Retrieves a specific draft owned by the user.

methods.name: list
methods.description: Lists all drafts for a user, ordered by most recent update.

methods.name: update
methods.description: Performs a full update (replace) of a specified draft.

methods.name: patchSection
methods.description: Partially updates a specific section within a draft, merging JSON objects.

methods.name: runDecisioning
methods.description: Performs risk scoring and decisioning on a draft.

methods.name: readiness
methods.description: Evaluates whether the draft is ready to be submitted based on required sections and documents.

methods.name: submit
methods.description: Submits a draft, performing validation, optional decisioning, and locking the draft.

methods.name: delete
methods.description: Deletes a draft owned by the user, if not submitted.
